prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Haskell. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```haskell
#!/usr/bin/env runhaskell
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
import System.Environment (getArgs)
import System.Directory (createDirectoryIfMissing, doesDirectoryExist, doesFileExist, getCurrentDirectory, listDirectory, withCurrentDirectory)
import System.FilePath (takeDirectory, (</>))
import System.IO (readFile, writeFile, hPutStrLn, stderr)
import Data.List (intercalate, isPrefixOf)
import Data.Time (getCurrentTime)
import Control.Monad (when, forM_, forM, unless)
import qualified Data.ByteString as BS
import qualified Data.ByteString.Char8 as BSC
import System.Process (readProcess)
import System.Exit (exitFailure)

main :: IO ()
main = do
  args <- getArgs
  case args of
    ["init"] -> initRepo
    ["add", file] -> addFile file
    ["commit", "-m", msg] -> commit msg
    ["log"] -> logCommits
    ["status"] -> status
    _ -> hPutStrLn stderr "Usage: minigit init|add <file>|commit -m <msg>|log|status"

initRepo :: IO ()
initRepo = do
  here <- getCurrentDirectory
  let gitDir = here </> ".minigit"
  exists <- doesDirectoryExist gitDir
  if exists
    then hPutStrln stderr "fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories): .minigit"
    else do
      createDirectoryIfMissing True (gitDir </> "objects")
      writeFile (gitDir </> "index") ""
      writeFile (gitDir </> "HEAD") "ref: refs/heads/main\n"
      createDirectoryIfMissing True (gitDir </> "refs" </> "heads")
      writeFile (gitDir </> "refs" </> "heads" </> "main") ""
      where hPutStrln = hPutStrLn

addFile :: FilePath -> IO ()
addFile file = do
  exists <- doesFileExist file
  unless exists $ do
    hPutStrLn stderr $ "minigit: add '" ++ file ++ "'"
    exitFailure
  indexPath <- getIndexPath
  indexContent <- readFile indexPath
  let newEntry = file ++ "\n"
  if file `elem` lines indexContent
    then return ()
    else appendFile indexPath newEntry

commit :: String -> IO ()
commit msg = do
  indexPath <- getIndexPath
  indexContent <- readFile indexPath
  if null (lines indexContent)
    then do
      hPutStrLn stderr "nothing to commit, working tree clean"
      exitFailure
    else do
      headPath <- getHeadPath
      headContent <- readFile headPath
      let branchRef = headContent -- "ref: refs/heads/main"
      let branch = drop 5 $ head (lines branchRef)
      let branchFile = ".minigit" </> branch
      branchExists <- doesFileExist branchFile
      parentCommit <- if branchExists then readFile branchFile else return ""
      let tree = intercalate "" (lines indexContent)
      let commitObj = "tree " ++ tree ++ "\n" ++
                      (if not (null parentCommit) then "parent " ++ parentCommit ++ "\n" else "") ++
                      "author minigit\n" ++
                      "committer minigit\n" ++
                      "\n" ++
                      msg ++ "\n"
      objHash <- hashString commitObj
      let objPath = ".minigit" </> "objects" </> objHash
      writeFile objPath commitObj
      writeFile branchFile objHash
      writeFile indexPath ""
      where hashString = return . show . fromEnum . sum . map fromEnum

logCommits :: IO ()
logCommits = do
  headPath <- getHeadPath
  headContent <- readFile headPath
  let branchRef = headContent -- "ref: refs/heads/main"
  let branch = drop 5 $ head (lines branchRef)
  let branchFile = ".min藏it" </> branch
  branchExists <- doesFileExist branchFile
  if not branchExists
    then hPutStrLn stderr "fatal: your current branch does not have any commits yet"
    else do
      let loop commitHash = do
            let objPath = ".minigit" </> "objects" </> commitHash
            objExists <- doesFileExist objPath
            if not objExists
              then return ()
              else do
                objContent <- readFile objPath
                let ls = lines objContent
                let tree = head $ filter ("tree " `isPrefixOf`) ls
                let parent = case filter ("parent " `isPrefixOf`) ls of
                              [] -> Nothing
                              (p:_) -> Just (drop 7 p)
                let msg = dropWhile (== "") $ dropWhile (/= "") ls
                putStrLn $ "commit " ++ commitHash
                putStrLn ""
                putStrLn $ intercalate "\n" msg
                putStrLn ""
                case parent of
                  Nothing -> return ()
                  Just p -> loop p
      commitHash <- readFile branchFile
      loop (head (lines commitHash))

status :: IO ()
status = do
  indexPath <- getIndexPath
  indexContent <- readFile indexPath
  if null (lines indexContent)
    then putStrLn "nothing to commit, working tree clean"
    else do
      putStrLn "Changes to be committed:"
      putStrLn "  (use \"minigit add <file>...\" to update what will be committed)"
      putStrLn ""
      forM_ (lines indexContent) $ \f -> do
        putStrLn $ "  " ++ f

getIndexPath :: IO FilePath
getIndexPath = do
  here <- getCurrentDirectory
  return (here </> ".minigit" </> "index")

getHeadPath :: IO FilePath
getHeadPath = do
  here <- getCurrentDirectory
  return (here </> ".minigit" </> "HEAD")
```
